Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export, type re-exports
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that exports the Hono class and re-exports types and utilities from other modules.
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, main file exports Hono and secondary type/construction exports.
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Type definitions for Hono core
+- Internal names noticed: Env, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: None local to file
+- Plain-English summary: Contains all core type definitions including environment, handlers, responses, and type inference utilities.
+- Copy-safe detail: Type definitions file, no runtime code, exports many interfaces and type aliases.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Defines the main Hono class that extends HonoBase and configures the router with default routers.
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, public Hono class with router initialization in constructor.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class, handler methods, error handling
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, errorHandler, route, router, fetch, onError, notFoundHandler, routeIndices, matchedRoutes, match, handle, get, post, put, delete, patch, options, on, use, onError, passThroughOnException, #handleError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./errors.ts, ./utils/, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing router, middleware composition, route registration, and error handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~450 lines, core HonoBase implementation with routing, middleware, and error handling logic.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, context variables, error access
+- Internal names noticed: Context, ContextVariable, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, req, res, finalized, error, getHeader, getHeaders, setHeader, setHeaders, getBody, getRaw, getEvent, new Response, error, waitUntil, passThroughOnException, #handleError
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ./types, ../client
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class providing access to request/response, variables, and event lifecycle methods.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~480 lines, Context class with variable management, response handling, event access, and error propagation.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, request accessors
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, h, header, headers, body, raw, matchedRoute, method, url, url.pathname, url.protocol, url.search, url.port, url.searchParams, get, query, form, json, get, raw, routeIndices, routeIndex, getIndex, match, error, route, req, method, input, url, matchedRoute, path, routeIndex
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./constants, ../utils/body, ../utils/cookie, ../client
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP request representation class with method/url parsing, headers/body access, query/form/json extraction, and route matching.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~520 lines, request handling class with URL parsing, method routing, body access methods, and validation.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export used for identifying GET route matches.
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, unique symbol export for route matching detection.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: body parsing functions
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseBody, formData, query, multipart
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request, ../utils/body, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types, ..
+- Plain-English summary: Utilities for parsing request body including form data, query strings, and multipart content.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~150 lines, body parsing utilities with type-safe parsing functions and form handling.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, index, middleware, error, next, finalized, res, context, routeIndex, onError, onNotFound, passThroughOnException
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition function that executes handlers sequentially with error and not-found handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, middleware dispatch function with index tracking, error handling, and response assignment.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, HTTPExceptionOptions, res, status, message, cause, getResponse, new Response
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for status 4xx/5xx with optional response object support.
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, HTTPException class extending Error with status, message, cause, and getResponse method.
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, utility exports, type re-exports
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types, ../types, ../utils/cookie
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client entry point exporting client builder, response utilities, and type inference.
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports everything from client module for convenient imports.
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: Client, hc, ClientRequestImpl
+- Internal names noticed: Client, hc, Callback, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, createProxy
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client builder implementing proxy pattern and request building with path/method handling.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~250 lines, Client class for building HTTP clients, hc function for convenience, ClientRequestImpl for request execution via proxy.
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, RequestClient, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch types
+- Internal names noticed: Client, RequestClient, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, FetchResultCallback, Callback, BuildSearchParamsFn, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientResponse, PathMethod, HttpMethod, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, DetailedError, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ../types, ..
+- Plain-English summary: Client module type definitions including request/response types and HTTP method/path combinations.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~330 lines, comprehensive type definitions for client interface, request/response, fetch, and status code filtering.
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, isObject, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, parameter handling, and search query building.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~115 lines, utility exports for URL/path manipulation, search params, merging, deep merging, and response parsing.
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex, detectResponseType
+- Imports or neighbors: None local to file
+- Plain-English summary: Smart fetch response parser that detects content-type and parses data, throwing DetailedError on non-ok responses.
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, fetch result parsing with content-type detection and custom error class with detail/code/log/statusCode properties.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./handler, types from adapter/service-worker
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers a Hono app to handle fetch events via addEventListener.
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, main adapter export with fire function that registers the handle function to service worker fetch event.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: handle, Handler, HandleOptions, FetchEvent, async, respondWith, globalThis
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types, types from adapter/service-worker, ./handle for app.fetch
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker handler that calls app.fetch with fetch event, passes 404 to fallback fetch.
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, handler function returning async function that calls app.fetch and responds via evt.respondWith.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent, waitUntil, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId
+- Imports or neighbors: None local to file
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent interface with waitUntil, clientId, and response methods.
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, extended interface for FetchEvent based on ExtendableEvent with Service Worker properties.
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
